lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's with the bucket on your head?

lines.speaker: Saunders
lines.text: If I can't see my enemies, they can't see me.

lines.speaker: Saunders
lines.text: Don't doubt me stranger. This pub will be mine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hope you can flex your way to victory.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I heard Santa saying we aren't allowed things on your back in the games, by the way.

lines.speaker: Saunders
lines.text: Does it look like I play by the rules?
